items.title: Anthropic’s Pentagon deal is a cautionary tale for startups chasing federal contracts
items.creator: Theresa Loconsolo
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: Anthropic’s Pentagon deal is a cautionary tale for startups chasing federal contracts
items.content: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. As Anthropic’s $200 million contract fell apart, the DoD turned to OpenAI instead, which accepted and then watched ChatGPT uninstalls surge 295%. As the stakes keep rising, the question remains: how much unrestricted […]
